title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 Instant, a new default model for ChatGPT
summary: The new GPT-5.5 Instant model will replace GPT-3.5 Instant as the default model for ChatGPT

title: US Government Will Vet Pre-Release AI Models From Google, xAI and Microsoft
summary: Google, Microsoft, and Elon Musk’s xAI have agreed to run their models by the U.S. government as Trump weighs an AI executive order.

title: Kaiko flags possible front-running before Robinhood token listings
summary: Kaiko said open interest, funding rates and wallet activity showed repeated pre-announcement positioning before several Robinhood token listings.

title: Europe should weigh tokenized SEPA payments, Bank of Italy official says
summary: The Bank of Italy’s deputy governor floated the evaluation of tokenized SEPA payments, as the ECB experiments with tokenized digital payment frameworks to avoid stablecoin competition.

title: Bullish to buy transfer agent Equiniti for $4.2B in tokenization push
summary: Bullish has agreed to acquire transfer agent Equiniti as more Wall Street participants accelerate their tokenization initiatives to offer 24/7 trading.

title: Morning Minute: Crypto VC Haun Raises $1B Despite Market Slump
summary: Bitcoin is firmly over $80k. The DTCC is about to tokenize everything. And World Liberty Fi countersues Justin Sun.

title: Geothermal startup Fervo Energy to raise up to $1.3B in IPO
summary: Enhanced geothermal startup Fervo Energy’s IPO could value the company at up to $6.5 billion.

title: Someone Built an Open-Source 'Theoretical Mythos' to Reverse-Engineer Anthropic's Most Dangerous AI
summary: OpenMythos is a from-scratch attempt to reconstruct the architecture behind Claude Mythos, the cyber-capable model Anthropic refuses to release. It's speculation in code form.

title: OpenAI’s cozy partner Cerebras is on track for a blockbuster IPO
summary: AI chip maker Cerebras is heading for a blockbuster IPO that could value it at $26.6 billion or more. Its relationship with OpenAI is deep and rich.

title: DeepClaude Lets You Run Claude Code With DeepSeek's Brain for 17x Cheaper
summary: A new open-source script swaps Claude Code's expensive Anthropic backend for DeepSeek V4 Pro, OpenRouter, or Fireworks AI—keeping the agent loop, slashing the bill.

title: Western Union Launches USDPT Stablecoin on Solana via Anchorage Digital
summary: Remittance giant Western Union’s USDPT token will power cross-border payments and a consumer spending product launching in 40+ countries.
